name: cabrain
description: Give Claude Code a persistent, hybrid-recall memory brain. Bundles the CaBrain MCP (recall/retain + brains + datasources), memory-first slash commands, a curator agent, and an onboarding connector. Powered by the `cabrain` CLI.

api_url.title: CaBrain API URL
api_url.description: Base URL of the CaBrain server (default https://cabrain.fadymondy.com).

api_token.title: CaBrain token (cbt_…)
api_token.description: Your access token. Mint one with `cabrain auth token new <name>` or ask a brain admin.

default_namespace.title: Default brain (optional)
default_namespace.description: Bind this session to one brain so tools default to it (e.g. think-os). Leave blank to pass namespace per call.

auto_recall.title: Auto-recall on every prompt
auto_recall.description: When on, each prompt is used to auto-recall relevant memories from the default brain and inject them as context (pull). Needs a default brain + a saved token.

inject_rules.title: Inject memory-first rules at session start
inject_rules.description: Inject the recall→answer→retain discipline into every session (default on).
